app.locale.title: Application Locale
app.locale.description: A [BCP 47 language tag](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/IETF_language_tag#List_of_major_primary_language_subtags) used throughout the application.

log.level.title: Logging Level
log.level.description: The level of detail recorded by the logger.

log.retentionDays.title: Logging Retention Days
log.retentionDays.description: The number of days to retain log files.

appdata.path.title: Application Data Path
appdata.path.description: The file system path where application data is stored. This makes Xon highly portable across systems.

appdata.dbPath.title: Application Database Path
appdata.dbPath.description: The file system path where application databases are stored.

appdata.cachePath.title: Application Cache Path
appdata.cachePath.description: The file system path where application cache is stored.

appdata.cacheQuota.title: Application Cache Quota
appdata.cacheQuota.description: The amount of local disk space to use for storing cache files.

appdata.logsPath.title: Application Logs Path
appdata.logsPath.description: The file system path where application logs are stored.

appdata.pluginsPath.title: Application Plugins Path
appdata.pluginsPath.description: The file system path where application plugins are stored.

network.sslPath.title: SSL Certificates Path
network.sslPath.description: The file system path where SSL certificates are stored.

session.updateAge.title: Session Update Age
session.updateAge.description: The number of days after which the session expiration is updated.

session.disableSessionRefresh.title: Disable Session Refresh
session.disableSessionRefresh.description: By default, whenever the session is used and the updateAge is reached, the session expiration is updated. This setting disables that functionality.

session.enableAnonymousLogins.title: Allow Anonymous Logins
session.enableAnonymousLogins.description: By default, Xon does not require an account to login. This makes Xon very easy to use, especially for people that don't need the additional security features. If, however, you want to require accounts, simply turn this off.
